problem_statement: Given the head of a linked list of integers, determine the middle node of the linked list. However, if the linked list has an even number of nodes, return the second middle node.

examples.explanation:
Node with value 3 is the middle node of this linked list.
                                         

Example 2:
In this example, the linked list has an even number of nodes hence we return the second middle node which is 4.
